raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "dark box (left box on table)",
    "Action concept": "Stabilize",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The right arm can reach the right side face of the dark box without colliding with the adjacent light box; the cup in front remains outside the arm sweep path.",
    "Postcondition": "The dark box is laterally constrained by the right end-effector to prevent sliding while the left arm engages."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "dark box (left box on table)",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (left)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The dark box has at least a small clearance on its left face for the left end-effector to make contact; the right arm is stabilizing the opposite face; no object (including the cup) blocks the lifting path above the box.",
    "Postcondition": "The dark box is securely held by opposing lateral contact (left arm primary hold, right arm assisting stabilization) and is ready to be lifted from the table."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "dark box (left box on table)",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "Both end-effectors have firm opposing contacts on the left and right faces of the dark box, with sufficient space to lift vertically without scraping the neighboring light box.",
    "Postcondition": "The dark box is lifted off the tabletop under stable dual-arm control, completing the pick-up."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: The right arm can reach the right side face of the dark box without colliding with the adjacent light box; the cup in front remains outside the arm sweep path.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The dark box is laterally constrained by the right end-effector to prevent sliding while the left arm engages.

parsed_json.Precondition: The dark box has at least a small clearance on its left face for the left end-effector to make contact; the right arm is stabilizing the opposite face; no object (including the cup) blocks the lifting path above the box.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The dark box is securely held by opposing lateral contact (left arm primary hold, right arm assisting stabilization) and is ready to be lifted from the table.

parsed_json.Precondition: Both end-effectors have firm opposing contacts on the left and right faces of the dark box, with sufficient space to lift vertically without scraping the neighboring light box.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The dark box is lifted off the tabletop under stable dual-arm control, completing the pick-up.
